com.mentor.chs.plugin.wiringdesigngenerator

Interface IXDiagramPartitionConfigurer


  • public interface IXDiagramPartitionConfigurer
    This class will be used by system to allow users to configure a partitioner plugin before diagram generation. An IXDiagramPartitionConfigurer is associated with an object of IXDiagramPartitionPlugin.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      javax.swing.JPanel getPanel(java.util.Map<java.lang.String,java.lang.String> settings)
      This method will be invoked by the system to allow implementations to create a UI for creation/modification of the settings of the partitioner plugin.
      void getSettings(IXPartitionerConfigurationSettings result)
      Return the plugin settings to be used by the system.
      This method is invoked after a call to getPanel(java.util.Map<java.lang.String, java.lang.String>).

    • Method Detail

      • getPanel

        javax.swing.JPanel getPanel(java.util.Map<java.lang.String,java.lang.String> settings)
        This method will be invoked by the system to allow implementations to create a UI for creation/modification of the settings of the partitioner plugin.
        Parameters:
        settings - Settings persisted in the system in a previous run. If no settings exist in the system, this map will be empty.
        Returns:
        A panel that would be embedded within CAVAI UI. The method can return null if there is no UI for creation/modification of the settings.

      • getSettings

        void getSettings(IXPartitionerConfigurationSettings result)
        Return the plugin settings to be used by the system.
        This method is invoked after a call to getPanel(java.util.Map<java.lang.String, java.lang.String>). Implementations can return the settings created/modified in the UI.
        This method will be invoked by the sytem even when the implementation has no UI(when a null is returned in the call to getPanel(java.util.Map<java.lang.String, java.lang.String>). This will allow plugin implementations without UI to update the persited settings
        Parameters:
        result - Updated settings of the plugin. The updated settings will be persisted by the system if persistence is specified in the result
